query: Fetch xView1 and FAIR1M images from July 2017. Then run the Swin-L detector on each imagery source. Last, from FAIR1M, plot the detections of category Van.

task0.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 and FAIR1M datasets specifically from July 2017.

task1.objective: Run the Swin-L detector on the images fetched from both xView1 and FAIR1M.

task2.objective: Plot the detections of the 'Van' category from the FAIR1M dataset on the map.
